title: aglaia elaeagnoidea var. bourdillonii
intro: Aglaia elaeagnoidea var. bourdillonii is a variety of the Aglaia elaeagnoidea tree, a species of plant in the family Meliaceae, native to the Western Ghats region of India. The bark of this plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Aglaia elaeagnoidea var. bourdillonii are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the bark is prepared into decoctions or extracts for use in herbal remedies.
